hero.title: Step into the Arctic, in the heart of Brazil
hero.subtitle: 45 minutes inside a fully frozen bar — the walls, the glasses, the sofas, even the artwork. Thermal cape, gloves and your first cocktail in a hand-carved ice glass, all included.

about.title: A trip to the Arctic, without leaving Brazil
about.p1: 40 tons of natural ice, hand-carved by our artists, keep ICE BAR at a steady −10°C all year round. You slip on a thermal cape, get your first drink in a glass carved from solid ice, and step through the door into a place that doesn't exist anywhere else nearby.
about.p2: Each visit lasts 45 minutes — long enough to take photos, share a toast and walk out with a story. Short enough that your drink won't melt. Almost.

how.title: Three steps into the Arctic
how.step1_body: Pick your time and group size. Secure checkout in under 2 minutes.
how.step2_body: Show up 15 min early. Our team helps you into the insulating cape and gloves.
how.step3_body: Walk through the door, raise your ice glass and enjoy 45 unforgettable minutes.

gallery.title: Moments worth keeping forever
gallery.subtitle: Tag #ICEBARBR and we'll feature you. The best shots get a free drink on your next visit.

experiences.title: Pick your experience
experiences.subtitle: From quick admission to a guided VIP tour. Plans for couples, families, groups and bachelor parties.
experiences.empty: Coming soon: new experiences. Check back in a few days or message us on WhatsApp.

testimonials.title: What our guests say
testimonials.subtitle: 4.8 out of 5 on TripAdvisor — over 1,200 reviews.

questions.a: Absolutely. Kids are welcome and get a special non-alcoholic drink (a tropical mocktail in an ice glass). We recommend ages 6 and up so they can enjoy the cold comfortably.

questions.q: Is it really that cold? Can I last 45 minutes?
questions.a: The thermal cape and gloves we hand out are built for −10°C. 95% of guests stay comfortable the whole time. We recommend wearing a long-sleeve top, long pants and closed shoes underneath.

questions.q: What if I get too cold before the 45 minutes are up?
questions.a: You can leave whenever you want — no fees, no fuss. Our team checks in on you the entire time.
Please do! Tag #ICEBARBR on Instagram and we'll re-share you. Tip: bring a waterproof phone sleeve (or grab one at the desk for R$ 15).
1 cocktail in an ice glass is included with admission. Extra drinks can be ordered at the inside bar (R$ 25 to R$ 45 each).

questions.q: How long is the full experience?
questions.a: 45 minutes inside the ice bar + 10–15 minutes to suit up and run through the safety briefing. About 1 hour total.
Yes — free parking for 2 hours. After that, R$ 10 per additional hour.
Yes, both the entrance and the bar are fully wheelchair accessible. Let us know when you book so we can have the team and an adapted thermal cape ready for you.

final_cta.title: Ready for −10°C?
final_cta.subtitle: Weekend slots sell out fast. Lock in your time now.

footer.tagline: The Arctic in Brazil. A bar made entirely of natural ice.
footer.hours_body:
Mon to Thu: 2pm – 11pm
Fri & Sat: 2pm – midnight
Sun: 2pm – 10pm
